validation_notes: Separate prose-governed, contract-backed, validator-backed, and runtime-implemented capability claims where maturity matters.
Authority sources must cite exact repo paths or explicitly identify the bounded task spec.
Stop conditions and validation posture must be explicit rather than implied.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If authority sources are conflicting or the required validation posture cannot be determined, return BLOCKED and enumerate the unresolved sources or gates.

validation_notes: This contract is artifact-oriented and does not imply a runtime control plane.
Every validation gate entry must name the exact script or command path used.
Execution status must be one of proposed, drafted, applied, or verified.
Validation outcome must be PASS or BLOCKED, and must not be merged with execution status.
Applied claims require real write evidence with explicit artifact and write target.
Verified claims require post-write verification evidence: read artifact state, recognition signal, and concrete verification reference.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If applied or verified claims are missing write evidence or post-write verification evidence, return BLOCKED and enumerate missing artifact paths, write targets, or verification references.

validation_notes: Handoff must be execution-evidence aligned and explicitly list unresolved blockers.
EVIDENCE REFERENCES must point to concrete artifacts and validation outputs.
OWNER / NEXT ACTION must be explicit and bounded.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If ownership, blockers, or evidence references are missing, return BLOCKED and enumerate unresolved handoff fields.

validation_notes: Every blocking/advisory gate entry must include gate id, command/script path, and pass/fail or advisory status.
EVIDENCE REFERENCES should point to concrete artifacts, fixtures, or generated outputs instead of narrative-only claims.
VERDICT must remain fail-closed when any blocking gate evidence is missing.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If blocking gate evidence is incomplete or contradictory, return BLOCKED and enumerate missing gate outputs and unresolved gaps.

validation_notes: Required contract and validation surfaces must use exact canonical paths.
COMPATIBILITY/EXPORT STATUS must separate canonical truth from compatibility mirrors.
CERTIFICATION DECISION must be explicit: CERTIFIED, BLOCKED, or ADVISORY-ONLY.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If required contracts, validations, or export-alignment evidence cannot be verified, return BLOCKED with unresolved evidence gaps.

validation_notes: Observed state must cite exact file paths.
Inferred claims must be marked as inferred.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If repo evidence is missing or contradictory, return BLOCKED and enumerate the missing paths.

validation_notes: State whether readiness is verified, blocked, or advisory-only.
Do not claim live readiness without concrete evidence.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If the required gates cannot be verified, return BLOCKED with the missing evidence list.

validation_notes: The required fields must always appear and stay branch-specific.
Result-type-specific sections are optional and must not replace the required fields.
Audit mode is descriptive, structural, token, and text-based only in v1.
Semantic visual-direction/layout/color/typography posture guidance must remain evidence-bounded, not brand-strategy claims.
Golden-ratio guidance is macro-only and must be subordinate to semantic clarity, accessibility, responsiveness, readability, and implementation practicality.
Native screenshot, DOM-runtime, and computed-style truth claims are not supported.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If required fields are missing or the output overclaims unsupported visual-runtime truth, return BLOCKED and name the missing or overclaimed fields.

validation_notes: Rendering posture recommendations must be region-scoped and evidence-backed.
Default to simpler posture when volatility and interactivity signals do not justify complexity.
Do not drift into infrastructure architecture or framework-specific implementation details.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If volatility, interaction, or UX constraints are missing, return BLOCKED with explicit evidence gaps by region.

validation_notes: Each slice must be independently testable.
The smallest safe first slice must be explicit.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If the requested migration is ambiguous, stop at the smallest safe slice and list the blockers.

validation_notes: Distinguish direct evidence from synthesis.
Do not overstate certainty when sources disagree.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If sources are insufficient, return a conservative synthesis with explicit gaps.

validation_notes: Contract expectations must be derived from explicit UI evidence or marked as inference.
Do not drift into UI critique or backend implementation review.
Unresolved ambiguities must remain open rather than normalized away.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If UI evidence is incomplete or contradictory, return BLOCKED and list missing interaction/state evidence.

validation_notes: Separate evidence, interpretation, and recommendation explicitly.
Do not overclaim conflict resolution when contradictions remain unresolved.
Confidence weighting must be grounded in provenance and evidence quality.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If contradiction resolution is underdetermined, return BLOCKED and preserve unresolved conflicts explicitly.

validation_notes: Every task slice must map back to a source-spec clause.
Keep scope on operationalization, not broad planning narratives.
Ambiguous clauses must be tracked as blockers or unresolved assumptions.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If the source spec cannot be operationalized safely, return BLOCKED and identify non-operationalizable clauses.

validation_notes: Runbook steps must be action-oriented and condition-gated.
Do not collapse into incident summary prose without response sequencing.
When evidence is incomplete, fail closed and expose open gaps explicitly.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If incident evidence is insufficient for safe runbook composition, return BLOCKED and enumerate missing operational signals.

validation_notes: All mode briefs must preserve the same factual core from source findings.
Unsupported audience requests must be explicitly rejected as BLOCKED.
No mode brief may introduce option-ranking claims or decision-authority language.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If source findings are incomplete or audience modes are unsupported, return BLOCKED and enumerate missing inputs or allowed modes.

validation_notes: Option scoring must cite explicit evidence or state assumptions.
Recommendation must preserve tradeoff transparency and uncertainty markers.
Sensitivity notes must identify which criteria can change the ranking.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If options, criteria, or evidence are incomplete, return BLOCKED and list the missing decision inputs.

validation_notes: Preserve provenance from source document to derived asset.
Do not drop unresolved ambiguities.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If the source document is incomplete or malformed, return a partial asset map with the missing segments called out.

validation_notes: Each finding must cite an exact file path or explicit missing surface.
Implemented, advisory-only, missing, and inferred controls must remain distinct.
Do not claim redaction, memory, or provider-switch safety without concrete evidence.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If secret-boundary evidence is missing or contradictory, return BLOCKED and enumerate the unresolved surfaces.

validation_notes: Do not claim remote deploy success without linked-project evidence and remote verification.
Separate preview, staging, and production evidence explicitly.
Fail closed when project binding, secret inventory, or migration order cannot be proven.
contracts.failure_or_partial_completion_behavior: If deployment evidence is missing or contradictory, return BLOCKED and enumerate the missing project, environment, or verification paths.
